headline: ‘The most vulnerable we’ve ever been’ — Ford CEO warns blue-collar worker shortage could hit your wallet next
summary: Ford CEO Jim Farley warns America’s skilled labor shortage could drive up prices, delay repairs, and worsen supply chain problems as millions of manufacturing jobs go unfilled.

raw.headline: ‘The most vulnerable we’ve ever been’ — Ford CEO warns blue-collar worker shortage could hit your wallet next

headline: Court rules against Section 122 tariffs: new legal risks for future tariffs?
summary: Investing.com -- The U.S. Court of International Trade (CIT) has ruled that President Trump’s 10% universal tariff, imposed under Section 122 of the Trade Act of 1974, is unlawful.

raw.headline: Court rules against Section 122 tariffs: new legal risks for future tariffs?
